changelog: v372: VideoInfoOverlay - dp() now uses real screen density instead of hardcoded 3f (fixes over-sized badge on non-3x devices)
v372: VideoInfoOverlay - refresh loop now self-terminates when overlay detached from hierarchy (stops perpetual 2s CPU/battery drain after player teardown)
v371: Crash prevention - StackOverflowError guard (depth cap + Throwable catch) in VideoInfoOverlay view recursion
v371: AutoResume - unguarded SharedPreferences reads at entry point now try-guarded (prevents ClassCastException crash)
v371: Minibar - runaway 300ms poll loop now single-instance/cancellable/slower cadence (fixes primary ANR suspect)
